texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. Fernando was assigned and collected a GSIB on 05/11. We will analyse an issue he faced using it during the last maintenance window (email subject: 'Fernando's GSIB unable to view prod env during maintenance window').
texts.text: Fernando was assigned and collected a GSIB on 05/11. We will analyse an issue he faced using it during the last maintenance window (email subject: 'Fernando's GSIB unable to view prod env during maintenance window').

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. Access to the DEV and STG environments was granted and confirmed to be working on 11/11 for 4 Simsys users (Thariq, Chinnam, Wen Jing, Khaing Su). Access is now restricted (there is no visibility on the OutSystems environment) and will be reactivated if requested by the CTOaaS development team.

Access is now restricted (there is no visibility on the OutSystems environment) and will be reactivated if requested by the CTOaaS development team.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The System Availability level shall not be less than NINETY-NINE POINT FIVE percent (99.5%) for each calendar month ('Monthly System Availability Level').
texts.text: The System Availability level shall not be less than NINETY-NINE POINT FIVE percent (99.5%) for each calendar month ('Monthly System Availability Level').

texts.label: text
texts.orig: SOT: Scheduled Operation Time is defined to be the scheduled operating hours for the System.
texts.text: SOT: Scheduled Operation Time is defined to be the scheduled operating hours for the System.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: SD: System Downtime is the accumulated time during which the System or its component is inoperable or partially inoperable due to system failure
texts.text: SD: System Downtime is the accumulated time during which the System or its component is inoperable or partially inoperable due to system failure
